---
title: "Places I have been to!"
lightbox: 
  match: auto
  effect: zoom
  desc-position: right
  loop: true
format:
  html:
    css: styles.scss
---
I haven't traveled very much outside of California. I look forward to adding more locations!

Red pins are cities I've lived in, blue pins are places I've visited.

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(leaflet)

mapdata <- read.csv("locations.csv")
mapdata$long <- as.numeric(mapdata$long)
mapdata$lat <- as.numeric(mapdata$lat)

# Map column values directly to Leaflet's allowed pin colors
mapdata$marker_color <- ifelse(mapdata$live == 1, "red", "blue")

# Map using addAwesomeMarkers to keep the pin shape
map <- leaflet(data = mapdata) %>% 
  addTiles() %>% 
  addAwesomeMarkers(
    lng = ~long, 
    lat = ~lat, 
    popup = ~city,
    icon = awesomeIcons(
      icon = 'ios-close', 
      iconColor = 'white',
      library = 'ion',
      markerColor = ~marker_color
    )
  )

map

```

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![South Salmon Creek](media/bodega.JPG){group="my-gallery" description="I used to live about 40 minutes from Bodega Bay and salmon creek was one of my favorite beaches to visit."}

![Sands Beach](media/sands.JPG){group="my-gallery" description="Now I live just a 20 minute walk from Sands beach so it is the beach I visit most often."}

![Morro Bay](media/morro.JPG){group="my-gallery" description="I've only been to Morro Bay once, but it is so gorgeous I had to include."}
:::
